purpose: Connects STF Vakkotavare Fjällstuga to Kebnats pier (M/S Langas boat continues to Saltoluokta). Critical link -- Vakkotavare has no boat pier.
operator: Road to Ritsem (replaced old Länstrafiken bus 93; run by Falcks Omnibus)
critical_warning_2026: 2026 Gällivare train-maintenance disruption may affect departures -- some days both trips run, some days only one. Check availability via SJ/VY/Norrtåg (Resplus) before relying on this.
season_2026: 22 June - 20 September 2026. Exact dates differ by trip/direction -- see below.
route_note: Each "Tur" is one round-trip vehicle: Gällivare -> Ritsem (Kebnats then Vakkotavare -- direction needed south-to-north), then back the same day (Vakkotavare then Kebnats).

outbound_gallivare_to_ritsem.direction: Kebnats -> Vakkotavare (needed by a south-to-north hiker)
Kebnats -> Vakkotavare (needed by a south-to-north hiker)

critical_date_gap_analysis_kebnats_to_va.note: Direction needed south-to-north. 31 Aug-5 Sept: only Tur 1 (12:00 arrival). 6-12 Sept: only Tur 2 (17:55 arrival). 13 Sept: no departure -- see the linked alert.
critical_date_gap_analysis_kebnats_to_va.recommendation: If Kebnats arrival lands on/near 13 Sept: rest day to shift earlier, push to 14 Sept, or call the operator.

critical_date_gap_analysis_vakkotavare_t.note: Opposite direction (e.g. backtracking). 1-5 Sept: only Tur 1. 7-13 Sept: only Tur 2. 6 Sept: no departure.

good_news: M/S Langas boat runs on its own schedule regardless of the bus -- Kebnats to Vakkotavare is the actual bottleneck.

fallback_contacts.note: For transport outside the timetable, these STF Saltoluokta contacts may know workarounds:

booking: Via Resplus operators: SJ (sj.se), VY (vy.se), Norrtåg (norrtag.se). Destination: 'Ritsem Fjällstation' or 'Kebnats/Saltoloukta'.
data_retrieval_note: Full timetable supplied directly by the route author (operator's domain is network-blocked for automated fetching in this session).
